steps.t: Fainneleg is seeking orders from the Angmarim that occupy the courtyard of Gwaelband, to the north-east of Echad Garthadir, where you encountered Ross…
Fainneleg is at the Ranger camp of Echad Garthadir in the centre of Annúminas. You have recovered the orders and should return at once to Fainneleg.
